SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

Class StidBarrierRegisterDataSource

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.StidBarrierRegisterDataSource
public class StidBarrierRegisterDataSource extends Object
Normalized STID tag-and-document JSON bridge that builds a BarrierRegister from externally normalized evidence.

This class does not connect to STID or document-management systems directly. Those systems should normalize their tag registers, safety-critical-element lists, and cross-referenced documents into JSON and pass it to this deterministic Java adapter so the resulting barrier register and its document evidence stay fully traceable.

Expected JSON shape (all keys optional): 

 {
   "registerId": "REG-001",
   "name": "Example installation barrier register",
   "installationCode": "AAA",
   "safetyCriticalElements": [
     {
       "id": "SCE-PSD",
       "tag": "PSD",
       "name": "Process shutdown",
       "type": "INSTRUMENTED_FUNCTION",
       "equipmentTags": ["VA-2001"],
       "barriers": [ { "id": "B-PSD-2001", "status": "AVAILABLE", "pfd": 0.01 } ]
     }
   ],
   "barriers": [
     {
       "id": "B-PSV-2001",
       "name": "PSV on inlet separator",
       "type": "MITIGATION",
       "status": "AVAILABLE",
       "equipmentTags": ["VA-2001"],
       "evidence": [ { "documentId": "PSV-LIST", "installationCode": "AAA", "excerpt": "PSV-2001 set 75 barg" } ]
     }
   ]
 }
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Constructor Details

    • StidBarrierRegisterDataSource

      public StidBarrierRegisterDataSource(String json)
      Creates a source from JSON text.
      Parameters:
      json - normalized STID tag-and-document JSON text

    • StidBarrierRegisterDataSource

      public StidBarrierRegisterDataSource(com.google.gson.JsonObject source)
      Creates a source from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      source - normalized JSON object, or null for an empty source

  • Method Details

    • getInstallationCode

      public String getInstallationCode()
      Reads the optional installation code used for traceability.
      Returns:
      installation code, or empty string when not present

    • read

      public BarrierRegister read()
      Builds a barrier register from the normalized JSON.
      Returns:
      populated barrier register (never null)

    • buildSce

      private SafetyCriticalElement buildSce(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, String installationCode)
      Builds a safety critical element from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - SCE JSON object
      installationCode - default installation code for traceability
      Returns:
      populated safety critical element

    • buildBarrier

      private SafetyBarrier buildBarrier(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, String installationCode)
      Builds a safety barrier from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - barrier JSON object
      installationCode - default installation code for traceability
      Returns:
      populated safety barrier

    • buildEvidence

      private DocumentEvidence buildEvidence(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, String defaultInstallationCode, int index)
      Builds a document evidence record, inheriting the register installation code when none is given.
      Parameters:
      record - evidence JSON object
      defaultInstallationCode - register-level installation code
      index - 0-based index used for default identifiers
      Returns:
      populated document evidence

    • addTags

      private static void addTags(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, SafetyCriticalElement sce)
      Adds equipment tags to an SCE from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - source object
      sce - target SCE

    • addBarrierTags

      private static void addBarrierTags(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, SafetyBarrier barrier)
      Adds equipment tags to a barrier from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - source object
      barrier - target barrier

    • addHazardIds

      private static void addHazardIds(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, SafetyBarrier barrier)
      Adds hazard identifiers to a barrier from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - source object
      barrier - target barrier

    • parseBarrierType

      static SafetyBarrier.BarrierType parseBarrierType(String raw)
      Parses a barrier type, tolerant to spacing, case, and underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw type text
      Returns:
      matching barrier type, defaulting to PREVENTION

    • parseBarrierStatus

      static SafetyBarrier.BarrierStatus parseBarrierStatus(String raw)
      Parses a barrier status, tolerant to spacing, case, and underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw status text
      Returns:
      matching barrier status, defaulting to UNKNOWN

    • parseElementType

      static SafetyCriticalElement.ElementType parseElementType(String raw)
      Parses an SCE element type, tolerant to spacing, case, and underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw type text
      Returns:
      matching element type, defaulting to OTHER

    • normalizeToken

      private static String normalizeToken(String raw)
      Normalizes an enum-like token to upper-case with underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw token text
      Returns:
      normalized token, or empty string when null/blank

    • firstArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray firstArray(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String[] keys)
      Returns the first JSON array present under any of the candidate keys.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      keys - candidate array keys
      Returns:
      first matching JSON array, or null when none present

    • optString

      private static String optString(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String key, String fallback)
      Reads an optional string field with a fallback default.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      key - field key
      fallback - default value when the field is absent or null
      Returns:
      field value, or the fallback
